import urllib.request
import json

TOKEN = "t-g1043smQNCVUF35SXLNGAG7RVRLIIWO3UBTNCXCD"
DOC_ID = "P9qLdk6g7oGO26x3r6ncLHLnnoh"
ROOT_BLOCK_ID = "P9qLdk6g7oGO26x3r6ncLHLnnoh"

def md_to_blocks(md_content):
    """Convert markdown to Feishu block format - text only blocks."""
    blocks = []
    lines = md_content.split('\n')
    i = 0
    while i < len(lines):
        line = lines[i]
        
        # Skip separators and auto-generated footer
        stripped = line.strip()
        if stripped == '---' or stripped == '*本摘要由系统自动生成*' or stripped == '---' :
            i += 1
            continue
        
        # Heading 1
        if stripped.startswith('# ') and not stripped.startswith('## '):
            text = stripped[2:]
            blocks.append({
                "block_type": 4,
                "heading1": {
                    "elements": [{"text_run": {"content": text}}]
                }
            })
            i += 1
            continue
        
        # Heading 2
        if stripped.startswith('## ') and not stripped.startswith('### '):
            text = stripped[3:]
            blocks.append({
                "block_type": 5,
                "heading2": {
                    "elements": [{"text_run": {"content": text}}]
                }
            })
            i += 1
            continue
        
        # Heading 3
        if stripped.startswith('### '):
            text = stripped[4:]
            blocks.append({
                "block_type": 6,
                "heading3": {
                    "elements": [{"text_run": {"content": text}}]
                }
            })
            i += 1
            continue
        
        # Empty or whitespace only
        if not stripped:
            i += 1
            continue
        
        # All other text lines - text block
        blocks.append({
            "block_type": 2,
            "text": {
                "elements": [{"text_run": {"content": stripped}}],
                "style": {}
            }
        })
        
        i += 1
    
    return blocks

def append_blocks(blocks, day_name, max_per_call=20):
    """Append blocks in batches."""
    total = len(blocks)
    for start in range(0, total, max_per_call):
        batch = blocks[start:start + max_per_call]
        url = f"https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/docx/v1/documents/{DOC_ID}/blocks/{ROOT_BLOCK_ID}/children"
        data = json.dumps({"children": batch}, ensure_ascii=False).encode('utf-8')
        
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, method='POST', headers={
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            'Authorization': f'Bearer {TOKEN}'
        })
        
        try:
            with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
                result = json.loads(resp.read())
                if result.get('code') == 0:
                    pass  # silent success
                else:
                    print(f"  [{day_name}] batch {start//max_per_call} ERROR: {result.get('msg')}")
                    return False
        except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
            body = e.read().decode('utf-8')
            print(f"  [{day_name}] batch {start//max_per_call} HTTP {e.code}: {body[:200]}")
            return False
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"  [{day_name}] batch {start//max_per_call} EXCEPTION: {e}")
            return False
    
    return True

days = [
    ("2026-03-07", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-07.md"),

errors = 0
for day_name, file_path in days:
    print(f"Processing {day_name}...", end=" ", flush=True)
    try:
        with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            md_content = f.read()

import urllib.request
import json

TOKEN = "t-g1043smQNCVUF35SXLNGAG7RVRLIIWO3UBTNCXCD"
DOC_ID = "P9qLdk6g7oGO26x3r6ncLHLnnoh"
ROOT_BLOCK_ID = "P9qLdk6g7oGO26x3r6ncLHLnnoh"

def make_text_block(text):
    return {
        "block_type": 2,
        "text": {
            "elements": [{"text_run": {"content": text}}],
            "style": {}
        }
    }

def make_heading_block(level, text):
    """Heading as text block with prefix for readability"""
    prefix = "#" * level + " "
    return make_text_block(prefix + text)

def process_file(file_path):
    """Process a single markdown file, return list of blocks."""
    with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        content = f.read()
    
    blocks = []
    lines = content.split('\n')
    i = 0
    
    while i < len(lines):
        line = lines[i].rstrip()
        stripped = line.strip()
        
        # Skip separators, footers, and empty lines
        if stripped == '---' or stripped == '*本摘要由系统自动生成*' or stripped == '':
            i += 1
            continue
        
        # Heading 1
        if stripped.startswith('# ') and not stripped.startswith('## ') and not stripped.startswith('### '):
            blocks.append(make_heading_block(1, stripped[2:]))
            i += 1
            continue
        
        # Heading 2
        if stripped.startswith('## ') and not stripped.startswith('### '):
            blocks.append(make_heading_block(2, stripped[3:]))
            i += 1
            continue
        
        # Heading 3
        if stripped.startswith('### '):
            blocks.append(make_heading_block(3, stripped[4:]))
            i += 1
            continue
        
        # Text line
        blocks.append(make_text_block(stripped))
        i += 1
    
    return blocks

def append_blocks_batch(blocks, token):
    """Append blocks in batches of 50."""
    total = 0
    for start in range(0, len(blocks), 50):
        batch = blocks[start:start+50]
        url = f"https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/docx/v1/documents/{DOC_ID}/blocks/{ROOT_BLOCK_ID}/children"
        data = json.dumps({"children": batch}, ensure_ascii=False).encode('utf-8')
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, data=data, method='POST', headers={
            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
            'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'
        })
        
        try:
            with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
                result = json.loads(resp.read())
                if result.get('code') == 0:
                    total += len(batch)
                else:
                    print(f"  ERROR: {result.get('msg')}")
                    return total
        except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
            print(f"  HTTP {e.code}")
            return total
    return total

# Days to process (already done 03-07, 03-08, 03-09, 03-10)
days = [
    ("2026-03-11", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-11.md"),
    ("2026-03-12", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-12.md"),
    ("2026-03-13", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-13.md"),
    ("2026-03-14", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-14.md"),

    ("2026-03-16", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-16.md"),
    ("2026-03-17", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-17.md"),
    ("2026-03-18", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-18.md"),
    ("2026-03-19", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-19.md"),
    ("2026-03-20", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-20.md"),
    ("2026-03-21", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-21.md"),
    ("2026-03-22", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-22.md"),
    ("2026-03-23", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-23.md"),
    ("2026-03-24", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-24.md"),
    ("2026-03-25", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-25.md"),
    ("2026-03-26", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-26.md"),
    ("2026-03-27", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-27.md"),
    ("2026-03-28", "C:\\Users\\RickQ\\.openclaw\\workspace\\memory\\2026-03-28.md"),
]

for day_name, file_path in days:
    print(f"Processing {day_name}...", end=" ", flush=True)
    try:
        blocks = process_file(file_path)
        count = append_blocks_batch(blocks, TOKEN)
        print(f"OK ({count} text blocks)")
    except FileNotFoundError:
        print(f"FILE NOT FOUND")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"ERROR: {e}")

print(f"\nDoc URL: https://feishu.cn/docx/{DOC_ID}")
